input.subject: Conference Schedule - TechSummit 2026
input.body_text:
Dear Attendee,

Thank you for registering for TechSummit 2026! Here's your personalized schedule:

Day 1 - February 10, 2026:
- Keynote Address
  Time: 9:00 AM - 10:30 AM
  Location: Main Hall, Convention Center
  Speaker: Jane Tech, CEO of FutureCorp

- Workshop: AI in Practice
  Time: 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM
  Location: Room 204, Convention Center
  Instructor: Dr. Bob AI

Day 2 - February 11, 2026:
- Networking Breakfast
  Time: 8:00 AM - 9:00 AM
  Location: Atrium, Convention Center

Venue: Downtown Convention Center, 789 Conference Blvd

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Best regards,
TechSummit Team
